coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set your grip and brace before the first rep. Keep chest ready to do the work.

coachingCues.title: Lower with control
coachingCues.body: Let the weight travel in a steady path. Keep shoulders packed and ribs quiet.

coachingCues.title: Drive smoothly
coachingCues.body: Press without bouncing or twisting. Finish with strong arms and a steady torso.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reset at the top before the next rep. Keep tension instead of rushing into the next descent.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set your grip and brace before the first rep. Keep chest ready to do the work.

coachingCues.title: Lower with control
coachingCues.body: Let the weight travel in a steady path. Keep shoulders packed and ribs quiet.

coachingCues.title: Drive smoothly
coachingCues.body: Press without bouncing or twisting. Finish with strong arms and a steady torso.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reset at the top before the next rep. Keep tension instead of rushing into the next descent.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set your grip and brace before the first rep. Keep upper chest ready to do the work.

coachingCues.title: Lower with control
coachingCues.body: Let the weight travel in a steady path. Keep shoulders packed and ribs quiet.

coachingCues.title: Drive smoothly
coachingCues.body: Press without bouncing or twisting. Finish with strong arms and a steady torso.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reset at the top before the next rep. Keep tension instead of rushing into the next descent.

coachingCues.title: Lock in a strong plank
coachingCues.body: Hands under shoulders, ribs tucked, glutes lightly squeezed. Keep one long line.

coachingCues.title: Lower as one piece
coachingCues.body: Bend the elbows with control. Chest and hips travel together toward the floor.

coachingCues.title: Pause without sagging
coachingCues.body: Stay braced near the bottom. Avoid shrugging or letting the hips drop.

coachingCues.title: Press the floor away
coachingCues.body: Drive through the hands until elbows extend and the shoulder blades move naturally.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set your grip and brace before the first rep. Keep chest ready to do the work.

coachingCues.title: Lower with control
coachingCues.body: Let the weight travel in a steady path. Keep shoulders packed and ribs quiet.

coachingCues.title: Drive smoothly
coachingCues.body: Press without bouncing or twisting. Finish with strong arms and a steady torso.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reset at the top before the next rep. Keep tension instead of rushing into the next descent.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set your grip and brace before the first rep. Keep shoulders ready to do the work.

coachingCues.title: Lower with control
coachingCues.body: Let the weight travel in a steady path. Keep shoulders packed and ribs quiet.

coachingCues.title: Drive smoothly
coachingCues.body: Press without bouncing or twisting. Finish with strong arms and a steady torso.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reset at the top before the next rep. Keep tension instead of rushing into the next descent.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Stand tall with dumbbells by your sides. Keep ribs down and shoulders relaxed.

coachingCues.title: Lead with elbows
coachingCues.body: Raise arms out to the sides with control. Keep wrists and elbows moving together.

coachingCues.title: Pause at shoulder height
coachingCues.body: Hold the top briefly without shrugging hard or swinging the torso.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Lower slowly until arms return to the sides. Keep tension through the last few inches.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set a small bend in the elbows and keep shoulder blades settled before opening the arms.

coachingCues.title: Open wide, stay controlled
coachingCues.body: Move through the chest with a smooth arc. Stop before the shoulders roll forward.

coachingCues.title: Bring the arms together
coachingCues.body: Think about hugging the space in front of you. Keep the elbows softly bent.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Pause with control, then open again without letting the weights pull you out of position.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set elbows near your ribs and stand tall. Keep shoulders quiet before pressing down.

coachingCues.title: Extend from the elbows
coachingCues.body: Press the handle down by straightening the arms. Avoid leaning your body into the rep.

coachingCues.title: Lock in the squeeze
coachingCues.body: Finish with arms long and triceps tight. Keep wrists stacked and neck relaxed.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Let the handle rise under control. Keep elbows in place for the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Hands secure on the bench, chest tall, feet planted. Start with elbows softly bent.

coachingCues.title: Bend elbows back
coachingCues.body: Lower with the upper arms moving behind you. Keep the chest open and shoulders controlled.

coachingCues.title: Press through the hands
coachingCues.body: Drive up by extending the elbows. Keep hips close to the bench.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reset at the top with steady shoulders before the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Brace, then reach tall
coachingCues.body: Sit tall with ribs stacked. Let the shoulders reach up without losing control.

coachingCues.title: Pull elbows down first
coachingCues.body: Start by driving elbows toward the ribs. Keep the chest lifted and neck relaxed.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze without leaning back
coachingCues.body: Finish with the bar near upper chest. Avoid turning the rep into a backward swing.

coachingCues.title: Control the stretch
coachingCues.body: Let arms lengthen under control so the lats stretch before the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Brace lightly and reach tall. Let the shoulders lengthen without losing control.

coachingCues.title: Elbows drive down
coachingCues.body: Start the pull by moving elbows toward the ribs. Keep chest lifted and neck relaxed.

coachingCues.title: Finish strong, no swing
coachingCues.body: Pause when the pull is complete. Keep the torso steady instead of turning it into a lean.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reach back to the start with control so the lats lengthen before the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Brace lightly and reach tall. Let the shoulders lengthen without losing control.

coachingCues.title: Elbows drive down
coachingCues.body: Start the pull by moving elbows toward the ribs. Keep chest lifted and neck relaxed.

coachingCues.title: Finish strong, no swing
coachingCues.body: Pause when the pull is complete. Keep the torso steady instead of turning it into a lean.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reach back to the start with control so the lats lengthen before the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Brace the torso and set the shoulders before the first pull. Keep the neck long.

coachingCues.title: Row elbows back
coachingCues.body: Pull elbows toward the hips or ribs. Keep the weight close and avoid twisting.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze the upper back
coachingCues.body: Pause with shoulder blades moving together. Keep ribs from flaring up.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reach forward under control. Keep the spine position steady for the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Brace the torso and set the shoulders before the first pull. Keep the neck long.

coachingCues.title: Row elbows back
coachingCues.body: Pull elbows toward the hips or ribs. Keep the weight close and avoid twisting.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze the upper back
coachingCues.body: Pause with shoulder blades moving together. Keep ribs from flaring up.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reach forward under control. Keep the spine position steady for the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Brace the torso and set the shoulders before the first pull. Keep the neck long.

coachingCues.title: Row elbows back
coachingCues.body: Pull elbows toward the hips or ribs. Keep the weight close and avoid twisting.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze the upper back
coachingCues.body: Pause with shoulder blades moving together. Keep ribs from flaring up.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Reach forward under control. Keep the spine position steady for the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set a steady torso and soft elbows. Start with shoulders relaxed, not shrugged.

coachingCues.title: Open from the shoulders
coachingCues.body: Move the arms apart with control. Let rear shoulders do the work, not momentum.

coachingCues.title: Hold the wide position
coachingCues.body: Pause briefly with arms wide and shoulder blades controlled.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Return slowly and keep tension instead of letting the weight snap back.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set a steady torso and soft elbows. Start with shoulders relaxed, not shrugged.

coachingCues.title: Open from the shoulders
coachingCues.body: Move the arms apart with control. Let rear shoulders do the work, not momentum.

coachingCues.title: Hold the wide position
coachingCues.body: Pause briefly with arms wide and shoulder blades controlled.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Return slowly and keep tension instead of letting the weight snap back.

coachingCues.title: Stand tall, elbows quiet
coachingCues.body: Brace lightly and keep elbows close to the sides before starting the curl.

coachingCues.title: Curl without swinging
coachingCues.body: Lift the dumbbells by bending the elbows. Keep shoulders relaxed and still.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze at the top
coachingCues.body: Pause briefly with the forearms high. Do not let elbows drift forward.

coachingCues.title: Own the way down
coachingCues.body: Lower slowly until arms are long again. Keep tension through the whole rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Stand tall and keep elbows close to your sides before the first curl.

coachingCues.title: Bend elbows, stay still
coachingCues.body: Curl the weight without swinging. Keep shoulders relaxed and upper arms quiet.

coachingCues.title: Squeeze at the top
coachingCues.body: Pause briefly with forearms high. Keep elbows from drifting forward.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Lower slowly until arms are long again. Keep control through the whole range.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Feet planted, ribs stacked, brace lightly before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Sit down with control
coachingCues.body: Send hips down and let knees track with toes. Keep pressure through the mid-foot.

coachingCues.title: Stay strong at depth
coachingCues.body: Keep the torso organized and heels grounded before driving up.

coachingCues.title: Drive the floor away
coachingCues.body: Stand tall without letting knees collapse inward or the weight drift forward.

coachingCues.title: Chest tall, weight close
coachingCues.body: Hold the weight tight to your chest. Stack ribs over hips before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Hips down, knees track
coachingCues.body: Sit between the knees with control. Let knees follow the toes instead of collapsing in.

coachingCues.title: Stay braced at depth
coachingCues.body: Keep heels grounded and the torso proud at the bottom before driving up.

coachingCues.title: Drive through mid-foot
coachingCues.body: Push the floor away and stand tall without letting the weight drift forward.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Feet planted, ribs stacked, brace lightly before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Sit down with control
coachingCues.body: Send hips down and let knees track with toes. Keep pressure through the mid-foot.

coachingCues.title: Stay strong at depth
coachingCues.body: Keep the torso organized and heels grounded before driving up.

coachingCues.title: Drive the floor away
coachingCues.body: Stand tall without letting knees collapse inward or the weight drift forward.

coachingCues.title: Soft knees, long spine
coachingCues.body: Start tall with a small knee bend. Keep the weight close and spine long.

coachingCues.title: Push hips back
coachingCues.body: Hinge from the hips. The weight travels down close to the legs, not away from you.

coachingCues.title: Find hamstring tension
coachingCues.body: Stop when you feel the hamstrings load while the back position stays strong.

coachingCues.title: Drive hips through
coachingCues.body: Stand by bringing hips forward. Finish tall without leaning back.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Start tall with ribs stacked and a small knee bend. Keep the load close.

coachingCues.title: Push hips back
coachingCues.body: Hinge from the hips while the torso follows. Keep the weight close to the body.

coachingCues.title: Find the loaded position
coachingCues.body: Pause when hamstrings feel ready to work and the spine stays long.

coachingCues.title: Drive hips through
coachingCues.body: Stand by bringing hips forward. Finish tall without leaning back.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Start tall with ribs stacked and a small knee bend. Keep the load close.

coachingCues.title: Push hips back
coachingCues.body: Hinge from the hips while the torso follows. Keep the weight close to the body.

coachingCues.title: Find the loaded position
coachingCues.body: Pause when glutes feel ready to work and the spine stays long.

coachingCues.title: Drive hips through
coachingCues.body: Stand by bringing hips forward. Finish tall without leaning back.

coachingCues.body: Feet planted, ribs stacked, brace lightly before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Sit down with control

coachingCues.title: Drive the floor away

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set the machine position and keep hips anchored before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Extend the knees
coachingCues.body: Straighten the legs smoothly without kicking or bouncing.

coachingCues.title: Pause with control
coachingCues.body: Hold the finish briefly so the target muscles do the work.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Return slowly and keep the machine path steady.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set the machine position and keep hips anchored before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Curl the pad back
coachingCues.body: Bend the knees smoothly and keep the upper body still.

coachingCues.title: Pause with control
coachingCues.body: Hold the finish briefly so the target muscles do the work.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Return slowly and keep the machine path steady.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Stand tall with feet planted and balance steady before lifting the heels.

coachingCues.title: Rise onto the toes
coachingCues.body: Lift heels smoothly and keep ankles tracking straight.

coachingCues.title: Pause high
coachingCues.body: Hold the top briefly with control instead of bouncing.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Lower heels slowly until the calves lengthen again.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Start tall with ribs stacked and a small knee bend. Keep the load close.

coachingCues.title: Push hips back
coachingCues.body: Hinge from the hips while the torso follows. Keep the weight close to the body.

coachingCues.title: Find the loaded position
coachingCues.body: Pause when glutes feel ready to work and the spine stays long.

coachingCues.title: Drive hips through
coachingCues.body: Stand by bringing hips forward. Finish tall without leaning back.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Start tall with ribs stacked and a small knee bend. Keep the load close.

coachingCues.title: Push hips back
coachingCues.body: Hinge from the hips while the torso follows. Keep the weight close to the body.

coachingCues.title: Find the loaded position
coachingCues.body: Pause when glutes feel ready to work and the spine stays long.

coachingCues.title: Drive hips through
coachingCues.body: Stand by bringing hips forward. Finish tall without leaning back.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set elbows under shoulders and create one long line from head to heels.

coachingCues.title: Brace and breathe
coachingCues.body: Keep steady tension while taking controlled breaths. Do not rush the hold.

coachingCues.title: Keep hips level
coachingCues.body: Keep hips from hiking up or dropping down.

coachingCues.title: Finish with control
coachingCues.body: End the set by lowering with control and keeping position until the last second.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Stack elbow under shoulder and line up ankles, hips, and ribs.

coachingCues.title: Brace and breathe
coachingCues.body: Keep steady tension while taking controlled breaths. Do not rush the hold.

coachingCues.title: Keep hips lifted
coachingCues.body: Hold the side line without rotating forward or backward.

coachingCues.title: Finish with control
coachingCues.body: End the set by lowering with control and keeping position until the last second.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set ribs down and brace lightly before the first rep.

coachingCues.title: Move with control
coachingCues.body: Let the target muscles guide the motion. Keep the lower back and hips steady.

coachingCues.title: Own the finish
coachingCues.body: Pause briefly at the hardest point without rushing or swinging.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Return to the start slowly and keep tension ready for the next rep.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Set posture and rhythm before increasing effort. Keep breathing steady.

coachingCues.title: Find a smooth rhythm
coachingCues.body: Move with repeatable steps or strokes. Keep effort steady instead of jerky.

coachingCues.title: Hold posture under effort
coachingCues.body: Stay tall through the torso and keep shoulders relaxed as the pace continues.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Ease back with control and keep movement smooth through the final seconds.

coachingCues.title: Set the base first
coachingCues.body: Move into the starting position slowly and keep breathing calm.

coachingCues.title: Ease into range
coachingCues.body: Move gradually until the target area feels loaded, not forced.

coachingCues.title: Breathe in the position
coachingCues.body: Stay relaxed enough to breathe while keeping the position organized.

coachingCues.title: Control the reset
coachingCues.body: Come out of the position slowly and reset before repeating.
